headline: The Best 3 Consumer Staples Stocks to Buy and Hold for Decades
summary: If you're looking for a blend of companies with consumer-staples-like operations and market-beating potential, these three deeply discounted stocks may be worth a buy.

headline: Will Innovation in Tide and Pampers Revive PG's Volume Growth?
summary: Procter & Gamble leans on Tide and Pampers innovation to lift volume growth through premium products, stronger performance and sharper retail execution.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive May Be Boring, But CL Stock Has Great Upside Potential Here
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) shares are making the most of the latest market attempt to broaden. The stock currently maintains a 56% “BUY” technical opinion from Barchart, as short-term momentum indicators begin to turn constructive following a solid move up from April’s $82 bottom. CL is trading below its 52-week high of...
